title: TotemHeads
body:
# Well, let's get started.

TotemHeads is are renamed totems with different animated displays.
###### Example: Smilly
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mBYHoe2C/images/d42dc58442ce590b441f5544041a6d24c73d1643.gif)

And this resourcepack allows you to replace **boring** totems with these **cute** guys.
Just rename the totem on the anvil to their names. (you can see them in the gallery)

TotemHeads will be added one at a time with each new version of the resourcepack.

# Requirements
This resourcepack require **[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** or **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)/[OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)**

---

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mBYHoe2C/images/7cdde8a415c2c2bfff1d663bc6f70f400d7d0718.png)
